hero.subtitle: AROS Technologies specializes in crafting cutting-edge medical and business software to elevate your operations to the next level.

metrics.title: Impact Metrics
metrics.subtitle: Real numbers that drive measurable business outcomes.

benefits.title: Why Choose Custom Software?
benefits.subtitle: Generic software forces your business to adapt. Custom software adapts to your business.
benefits.card1_desc: Built explicitly for your workflows, reducing unnecessary overhead and automating manual tasks.
benefits.card2_desc: Engineered with end-to-end encryption, strict access controls, and full compliance with any regulatory, legal, and industry standards.
benefits.card3_desc: Bridges the gaps in your current infrastructure, connecting existing CRMs, EHRs, and databases.

process.title: Our Engineering Roadmap
process.subtitle: A transparent, structured process designed to take your idea from concept to production.
process.step1_desc: We deep-dive into your operational pain points, defining scope, constraints, and architecture.
process.step2_desc: Interactive mockups allow you to experience and approve the user flow before a single line of code is written.
process.step3_desc: Iterative bi-weekly sprints with continuous staging deployments so you can track progress live.
process.step4_desc: Production launch followed by telemetry monitoring, database tuning, and scaling support.

demos.title: Interactive Demos
demos.subtitle: Experience the power of our solutions firsthand.

items.title: Medical Dashboard Pro
items.description: A comprehensive Electronic Health Record (EHR) dashboard featuring real-time patient monitoring, secure data transmission, and predictive analytics for hospital resource management.

items.title: Enterprise ERP System
items.description: A highly scalable enterprise resource planning tool tailored for manufacturing. Includes automated inventory tracking, supply chain forecasting, and financial reporting.

items.title: Telehealth Connect
items.description: A HIPAA-compliant video consultation platform with integrated billing, digital prescriptions, and automated appointment scheduling.

items.title: Logistics Route Optimizer
items.description: An AI-powered logistics tracking system that visualizes fleet movements, optimizes delivery routes in real-time, and reduces fuel consumption.

items.title: FinTech Payment Gateway
items.description: A secure, multi-currency payment processing gateway designed for high-volume transactions with built-in fraud detection and regulatory compliance.

products.title: Our Products
products.description: Secure, compliant, and intuitive applications ready to deploy and improve your workflows instantly.

services.title: Custom Services
services.description: Scalable enterprise software development that optimizes processes, drives efficiency, and accelerates growth.

services_page.title: Our Services
services_page.subtitle: Comprehensive engineering solutions tailored to your unique technical and business challenges.

items.title: Custom Enterprise Software
items.description: End-to-end development of scalable, secure, and highly available web and mobile applications tailored to your exact business logic.

items.title: Cloud Architecture & DevSecOps
items.description: Design, deployment, and management of resilient cloud infrastructures on AWS, GCP, or Azure with automated CI/CD pipelines and baked-in security.

items.title: Legacy System Modernization
items.description: Refactoring and migrating outdated monolithic systems into modern microservices architectures without disrupting your ongoing operations.

items.title: Data Engineering & AI Solutions
items.description: Building robust data pipelines, data warehouses, and integrating custom machine learning models to unlock predictive analytics and business intelligence.

about.title: Why AROS Technologies?
about.description: We are a team of dedicated engineers and designers focused on delivering premium software experiences tailored to your unique industry challenges.
about.founder_bio: Passionate about building robust, high-performance, and elegant software solutions for business and medical industries.
about.history_p1: AROS Technologies started with a vision to revolutionize how businesses operate by leveraging modern, secure, and highly scalable software architecture.
about.history_p2: We are dedicated to continuous innovation, ensuring our clients stay ahead of the curve in an increasingly digital landscape. This space will be updated with more of our story soon.
